sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports swelling in their ankles and a history of swelling approximately one to two months after starting norvasc. He also reports a history of diabetes and reports swelling started approximately one to two months after starting norvasc. The patient reports swelling in their ankles.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure is 120/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. Examination reveals edema in the lower extremities.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has diabetes and edema in the lower extremities. The edema may be related to norvasc.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders a hemoglobin a1c test. The doctor recommends starting naproxen. The doctor recommends starting flexeril. The doctor orders hydrochlorothiazide. The doctor continues metformin. The doctor orders an electrocardiogram.
